perks.summary: discover a govd node — GET /health + /catalog over HTTP (portable, read-only); reports node identity (chip_sha/mode/runs) + the governed catalog

forward a governed claim to a node — submit a sub-claim (run_governed), the node blesses + oversees every step (faithful non-root execution), returns the verdict + ledger pointer; destructive sub-claims push_back until APPROVE
node liveness + identity probe — GET /health, report up/down + chip_sha/mode/runs (portable, read-only); a fast liveness check, lighter than discover
